channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping, 1st July
item.description:
More rubbish spread over the grass a pile of stuff a fence post and some blue plastic.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Witherston Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping again, 1st July
item.description:
A cut down tree and slab of glass have been dumped on the green again.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wynford Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 large (catering size) pots of cranberry sauce dumped by park bench, 1st July
item.description:
Someone has dumped 2 large pots of cranberry sauce which have tipped out around the park bench. There is also a large amount of litter around the bench.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nithdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned blue crushed chair, 1st July
item.description:
Hi there a chair has been left by are bins over night behind the green bike shed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Person that owns the vehicle does not live in the court., 1st July
item.description:
The person that parks this car here, does not live here. They leave the vehicle here for weeks on end.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lubbock Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Househols and commercial rubbish, 1st July
item.description:
A pile of household and comercial rubbish accumulated for weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Clarence Avenue, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged to the wall, 1st July
item.description:
The wall is damaged here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Priory Avenue, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 1st July
item.description:
As a regular litter picker, I’m noticing someone is regularly dumping their domestic rubbish in this area of priory Gardens previously I have picked it up and put it in the bin however this is getting out of hand , three sacks !

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Hill, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tables doors poles furniture Chester drawers dog cage bottles mattress, 1st July
item.description:
Somebody behind 1 westdale road in the flats above the shops on Herbert Road keep fly tipping on the green on Westdale Road, every single week. The rubbish keep piling up and number two Westdale Road keeps reporting and nothing is being done. There are road sweepers that attend the street that do not clean it up.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westdale Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree in Lodge Gardens which is dead., 1st July
item.description:
As you drive into Lodge Gardens from Upper Elmers End Road, tree is on right hand side, just by alley way and 1 Lodge Gardens.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lodge Gardens, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead baby fox cub, 1st July
item.description:
Dead baby fox cub, on grassed area of communal area, outside residence window, outside Woodford House, Barnfield Estate.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keeble Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constantly filthy street, 1st July
item.description:
St Nicholas Road is constantly filthy with tonnes of litter. The park opposite gets regularly cleaned but this road gets completely neglected? Can’t the park cleaners also sweep this street? It’s such an eye sore I’ve never seen it clean

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Nicholas Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolley blocking the pavement, 1st July
item.description:
A shopping trolley was abandoned on the pavement and it's blocking access for the wheelchair and buggy users.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, Star Lane, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed left outside 36 crawthew grove and bathroom cabinet has been moved and left outside 21 Crawthew Grove on the pavement., 1st July
item.description:
Bed left outside 36 crawthew grove and bathroom cabinet has been moved and left outside 21 Crawthew Grove on the pavement. Been there 2 days.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Crawthew Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins outside 111 Chatham steer, 1st July
item.description:
Plastic hot tub and wooden furniture left next to bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars that park on the pavement, 1st July
item.description:
Cars continually parked opposite the Hill pub in the evening. I use a mobility scooter and have to go in the road as the customers park illegally blocking the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Dartmouth Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown lane, 1st July
item.description:
Overgrown lane. All needs cutting back considerably. Also need a bin at the end of the lane as dog mess left behind

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gravel Pit Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass is too high, issue for dogs, 1st July
item.description:
Grass hasn't been cut for many weeks. Dogs get seeds in ears when using grass. Difficult to access car doors
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 178, Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown lane, 1st July
item.description:
Overgrown lane needs cutting back considerably

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Riefield Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large fly-tipped items blocking bin access, causing missed bin collection and overflowing communal bins., 1st July
item.description:
Large items, including furniture and other dumped waste, have been fly-tipped in the communal bin area and are blocking access to the bins. Because of this obstruction, the refuse collection on Tuesday could not empty the bins. The communal bins are now completely full and overflowing, and more rubbish is being left because there is no space. This is creating a health and cleanliness issue for residents. Fly-tipping is a recurring problem at this location, but this incident has prevented the scheduled bin collection. Please arrange for the fly-tipped items to be removed as soon as possible and for the overflowing bins to be emptied.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Pearson Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet
